scripts.test:bdd: npm run bddgen && playwright test -c playwright.bdd.config.ts
scripts.test:bdd:ui: npm run bddgen && playwright test -c playwright.bdd.config.ts --project=bdd-ui-chromium
scripts.test:bdd:regression: npm run bddgen:regression && playwright test -c playwright.bdd.config.ts --project=bdd-ui-chromium
scripts.test:bdd:trace-viewer-test: npm run bddgen:trace-viewer-test && playwright test -c playwright.bdd.config.ts --project=bdd-ui-chromium; true
scripts.debug:bdd:ui: npm run bddgen && playwright test -c playwright.bdd.config.ts --ui
